assembly_steps.role: use the energy-to-norm transfer lemma as the main norm-control estimate input
confirm no unclassified boundary flux term remains in the assembled norm-control estimate
confirm no unclassified interior error term remains in the assembled norm-control estimate
package the assembled estimate as the restricted continuation norm-control closure target

positive: Records the norm-control closure assembly lemma target after the energy-to-norm transfer lemma.

negative: Does not prove the energy-to-norm transfer lemma.
